items.title: Braden Smith: It was (obviously) tough for the Pacers when Tyrese, Nembhard, & TJM were all out at the start of the season, and they prefer to play with multiple point guards. Kam’s left-hand dominance and lack of burst/kick were limiting and required a lot of reorienting of the
items.author: Caitlin Cooper
items.body_excerpt: Braden Smith: It was (obviously) tough for the Pacers when Tyrese, Nembhard, & TJM were all out at the start of the season, and they prefer to play with multiple point guards. Kam’s left-hand dominance and lack of burst/kick were limiting and required a lot of reorienting of the offense.

items.title: Keaton Wagler said that he watches several NBA guards in the league, but mentioned Tyrese Haliburton and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander as the two he really tends to take after. Wagler said “closest person is probably Haliburton” for his play style.

items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler said that he watches several NBA guards in the league, but mentioned Tyrese Haliburton and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander as the two he really tends to take after. Wagler said “closest person is probably Haliburton” for his play style.
